1:0-4:1: SUM_DEF :: `enum Option {
    None,
    Some(u32),
}` :: typeof(Option { None | Some(uN[32]) })
3:7-3:10: TYPE_ANNOTATION :: `u32` :: typeof(uN[32])
5:0-5:33: FUNCTION :: `fn f() -> Option {
    Option::None
}` :: () -> Option { None | Some(uN[32]) }
5:3-5:4: NAME_DEF :: `f` :: () -> Option { None | Some(uN[32]) }
5:10-5:17: TYPE_ANNOTATION :: `Option` :: typeof(Option { None | Some(uN[32]) })
5:17-5:33: STATEMENT_BLOCK :: `{
    Option::None
}` :: Option { None | Some(uN[32]) }
5:19-5:31: COLON_REF :: `Option::None` :: Option { None | Some(uN[32]) }
5:19-5:31: STATEMENT :: `Option::None` :: Option { None | Some(uN[32]) }
